mapper.sql: a.id as id, a.addtime as addtime, a.wentileixing as wentileixing, a.guanjianci as guanjianci, a.wenti as wenti, a.daan as daan, a.paixu as paixu, a.clickcount as clickcount, a.zhuangtai as zhuangtai
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM aikefuzhishiku a WHERE a.zhuangtai = '启用' AND ( a.guanjianci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.wenti LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY a.paixu ASC

SELECT
FROM aikefuzhishiku a WHERE a.zhuangtai = '启用' ORDER BY a.clickcount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
